sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the current image, the character has moved UP. The white body is now at a higher position, overlapping with the top part of the green U-shape. Let me check the current state to see how many green pixels remain.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
current_seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = [n for n in current_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
whites = [n for n in current_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 10]

print("White body:")
for w in whites:
    rows = [p[0] for p in w['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in w['boundary']]
    print(f"  rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={w['pixels']}")

print("\nGreen shapes:")
total_green = 0
for g in greens:
    rows = [p[0] for p in g['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in g['boundary']]
    print(f"  rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={g['pixels']}")
    total_green += g['pixels']
print(f"  Total green pixels: {total_green}")

# Check if level completed
print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
